# appStep

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

CRUD operations for AppStep records via app CLI

## Usage

```bash
app app-step list
app app-step get --id <value>
app app-step create --actorId <value> --name <value> --count <value>
app app-step update --id <value> [--actorId <value>] [--name <value>] [--count <value>]
app app-step delete --id <value>
```

## Examples

### List all appStep records

```bash
app app-step list
```

### Create a appStep

```bash
app app-step create --actorId "value" --name "value" --count "value"
```

### Get a appStep by id

```bash
app app-step get --id <value>
```
